_comment: UNVERIFIED stocking-feed leads -- same shape as sources.json. The Claude Code sandbox egress allowlist blocks these hosts, so the end-to-end check couldn't run when they were researched (2026-06). Run `python scripts/verify_feed_sources.py --candidates` from a dev machine or CI (open egress), fill in the field mappings from the dump, and promote passing entries into sources.json. Leads without a confirmed layer id: TN TWRA (tnmap.tn.gov/arcgis/rest/services/ENVIRONMENTAL/TWRA/MapServer -- has a 'Stocked Trout Fisheries' dataset per tn-tnmap.opendata.arcgis.com), WI DNR (dnrmaps.wi.gov FM_Trout/FM_TROUT_REGS_WTM_Ext + FM_TROUT_HAB_SITES_WTM_Ext MapServers), ND Game & Fish (ndgishub.nd.gov Applications/GNF_FishingWaters/MapServer carries stocking attributes per gf.nd.gov/maps/data), MI DNR (stocking is a tabular database at www2.dnr.state.mi.us/fishstock, no known ArcGIS layer).

sources.label: NJ DEP Trout Stocked Streams
sources.note: Same layer the trout overlay build already uses live; reachable from the production runtime.

sources.label: WV DNR Stocked Trout Streams
sources.note: Same layer data/trout/sources.json uses live; host blocked only from the dev sandbox.

sources.label: NY DEC Stocked Trout Streams
sources.note: Trout overlay build already consumes this layer; the MGMTCAT filter keeps only stocked management categories.
